description_long: This object is a dark-colored milkshake served in a tall, tapered cup with a wide, flat, gray lid. A single red straw protrudes from the center of the lid, angled slightly in some views. The cup features a distinctive yellow-outlined banana graphic on one side, suggesting a banana-flavored milkshake. The surface of the cup appears smooth and likely made of plastic or coated paper, while the lid is a matching gray plastic. No visible toppings are present on the milkshake, and the cup is unbranded except for the banana motif. The overall design is typical of takeaway beverages found in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or fast-food outlets.
description: A tall, dark cup with a flat gray lid and red straw, featuring a yellow banana graphic on one side. The cup is smooth and unbranded, resembling a typical takeaway milkshake.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dark cup with a flat gray lid and a red straw centered vertically, no visible graphics.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the yellow banana graphic on the cup and the red straw angled slightly to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the red straw centered and no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the banana graphic and the red straw angled, similar to view 1.
